COPY THE ENTIRE LINE BELOW AS THE URL OF YOUR 'mrip' BOOKMARK:

javascript:(function(){'use strict';const ID='mrip-overlay';if(document.getElementById(ID)){document.getElementById(ID).remove();return;}function log(...a){console.log('[mrip]',...a)}function sanitize(n){return(n||'media').replace(/[<>:"/\\\\|?*]/g,'_').slice(0,110)||'media'}function ext(u,t){u=u.split(/[?#]/)[0];const m=u.match(/\\.([a-z0-9]{2,5})$/i);if(m)return'.'+m[1].toLowerCase();return t==='image'?'.jpg':t==='video'?'.mp4':t==='audio'?'.mp3':''}function up(u){if(!u)return u;if(u.includes('pinimg.com'))return u.replace(/\\/(originals|\\d+x)\\//i,'/originals/').replace(/\\/236x\\//i,'/736x/');return u}function collect(){const o=[],s=new Set;document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(el=>{let u=el.currentSrc||el.src||'';if(!u||u.startsWith('data:')&&u.length<200)return;const w=el.naturalWidth||el.width||0,h=el.naturalHeight||el.height||0;if(w<36&&h<36)return;u=up(u);if(s.has(u))return;s.add(u);o.push({url:u,type:'image',w,h,alt:(el.alt||'').trim()})});document.querySelectorAll('video,source').forEach(v=>{const u=v.currentSrc||v.src;if(u&&!s.has(u)){s.add(u);o.push({url:u,type:'video',alt:''})}});document.querySelectorAll('audio,source').forEach(a=>{const u=a.currentSrc||a.src;if(u&&!s.has(u)){s.add(u);o.push({url:u,type:'audio',alt:''})}});document.querySelectorAll('a[href]').forEach(a=>{const h=a.href;if(h&&/\\.(jpe?g|png|gif|webp|mp4|webm|mp3|wav|ogg)(\\?|$)/i.test(h)&&!s.has(h)){s.add(h);o.push({url:h,type:/\\.(mp4|webm)/i.test(h)?'video':/\\.(mp3|wav|ogg)/i.test(h)?'audio':'image',alt:''})}});return o}async function dlFS(it,d){try{const r=await fetch(it.url,{mode:'cors'});if(!r.ok)throw 0;const b=await r.blob();const e=ext(it.url,it.type);const n=sanitize((it.alt||it.url.split('/').pop()||'f')+e);const fh=await d.getFileHandle(n,{create:true});const w=await fh.createWritable();await w.write(b);await w.close();}catch(e){await dlLink(it)}}function dlLink(it){return new Promise(r=>{const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=it.url;a.download=sanitize((it.alt||it.url.split('/').pop()||'f')+ext(it.url,it.type));a.style.cssText='position:absolute;left:-9999px';document.body.append(a);a.click();setTimeout(()=>{a.remove();r()},130)})}async function go(sel){if(!sel.length)return;let dh=null;if('showDirectoryPicker'in window){try{dh=await showDirectoryPicker({id:'mrip',mode:'readwrite',startIn:'downloads'})}catch(e){}}const p=document.getElementById('mrip-progress');let c=0;for(const it of sel){c++;if(p)p.textContent='Downloading '+c+'/'+sel.length+'...';try{if(dh)await dlFS(it,dh);else await dlLink(it)}catch(e){}await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,120))}if(p)p.textContent='Done. Closing...';setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById(ID)?.remove(),900)}function ui(items){const o=document.createElement('div');o.id=ID;o.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2147483647;background:rgba(0,0,0,.78);font-family:system-ui;color:#eee;display:flex;flex-direction:column';const h=document.createElement('div');h.style.cssText='padding:6px 10px;background:#111;border-bottom:1px solid #333;display:flex;align-items:center';h.innerHTML='<b style="margin-right:8px">mrip</b><span id="mrip-mode" style="font-size:9px;opacity:.5;background:#222;padding:1px 3px;border-radius:2px;margin-left:4px">DL</span><span id="mrip-count" style="opacity:.6"></span><div style="flex:1"></div><button id="mrip-x" style="background:#222;border:1px solid #555;color:#ddd;padding:3px 8px">Close</button>';o.append(h);const _sup='showDirectoryPicker'in window;if(_sup){var mm=document.getElementById('mrip-mode');if(mm){mm.textContent='FS';mm.title='Direct writes (Edge/Chrome/Brave/Opera)'} }else{var mm=document.getElementById('mrip-mode');if(mm){mm.title='Standard downloads (Firefox + fallbacks)'}}const t=document.createElement('div');t.style.cssText='padding:4px 10px;background:#1a1a1a;border-bottom:1px solid #333;display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:12px';t.innerHTML='<button id="sa">All</button><button id="sn">None</button><select id="ft"><option value="">All</option><option value="image">Images</option><option value="video">Video</option><option value="audio">Audio</option></select><input id="ms" type="number" value="50" style="width:48px;background:#222;border:1px solid #444;color:#ddd">px <span style="flex:1"></span><button id="cp">Copy URLs</button><button id="go" style="background:#063">Download Selected</button>';o.append(t);const g=document.createElement('div');g.style.cssText='flex:1;overflow:auto;padding:8px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:6px';o.append(g);const f=document.createElement('div');f.style.cssText='padding:4px 10px;background:#111;font-size:11px;border-top:1px solid #333';f.innerHTML='<span id="mrip-progress"></span> <span style="opacity:.5;margin-left:10px">Personal use • Respect copyright</span>';o.append(f);document.body.append(o);let vis=items;const ch=new Map();function r(list){g.innerHTML='';ch.clear();list.forEach(it=>{const c=document.createElement('div');c.style.cssText='background:#222;border:1px solid #333;border-radius:5px;overflow:hidden;font-size:11px';const top=document.createElement('div');top.style.cssText='padding:2px 4px;background:#1a1a1a;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px';const cb=document.createElement('input');cb.type='checkbox';cb.checked=false;const bd=document.createElement('span');bd.textContent=it.type;bd.style.fontSize='9px';top.append(cb,bd);const nm=document.createElement('div');nm.style.cssText='padding:2px 4px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis';nm.textContent=it.alt||it.url.split('/').pop();const pr=document.createElement('div');pr.style.cssText='background:#111;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;max-height:110px;min-height:48px;border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a2a';let p;if(it.type==='image'){p=document.createElement('img');p.src=it.url;p.style.maxWidth='100%';p.style.maxHeight='100%'}else if(it.type==='video'){p=document.createElement('video');p.src=it.url;p.muted=true;p.style.maxHeight='100%'}else{p=document.createElement('div');p.textContent='♫';p.style.fontSize='28px';p.style.opacity='.5'}if(p)pr.append(p);const u=document.createElement('div');u.style.cssText='font-size:9px;padding:1px 4px;opacity:.4;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap';u.textContent=it.url;c.append(top,pr,nm,u);cb.onchange=u2; c.onclick=e=>{if(e.target!==cb&&e.target.tagName!=='VIDEO') {cb.checked=!cb.checked;u2()}};g.append(c);ch.set(it,cb)});u2()}function u2(){const b=document.getElementById('go');if(b)b.textContent='Download Selected ('+Array.from(ch.values()).filter(x=>x.checked).length+')'}function flt(){const ty=document.getElementById('ft').value;const ms=+document.getElementById('ms').value||0;vis=items.filter(i=>{if(ty&&i.type!==ty)return!1;if(ms&&i.type==='image'&&(i.w||0)<ms&&(i.h||0)<ms)return!1;return!0});r(vis)}function getSel(){return vis.filter(i=>ch.get(i)?.checked)}document.getElementById('sa').onclick=()=>{ch.forEach(c=>c.checked=!0);u2()};document.getElementById('sn').onclick=()=>{ch.forEach(c=>c.checked=!1);u2()};document.getElementById('ft').onchange=flt;document.getElementById('ms').oninput=flt;document.getElementById('go').onclick=()=>{const s=getSel();if(s.length)go(s)};document.getElementById('cp').onclick=()=>{const s=getSel().map(i=>i.url).join('\\n');navigator.clipboard.writeText(s).catch(()=>{})};document.getElementById('mrip-x').onclick=()=>o.remove();document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')o.remove()},{once:true});r(vis);document.getElementById('mrip-count').textContent=items.length+' items'}const its=(function(){const o=[],s=new Set;document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(el=>{let u=el.currentSrc||el.src||'';if(!u||s.has(u))return;const w=el.naturalWidth||el.width||0,h=el.naturalHeight||el.height||0;if(w<30&&h<30)return;s.add(u);o.push({url:u,type:'image',w,h,alt:el.alt||''})});return o})();if(its.length)ui(its);else alert('No images found for demo bookmarklet');})();
